rawContent:
## Quality Review Verdict

**✅ PUBLISH** - All 8 criteria passed:
- Clear structure, appropriate audience fit, naturally integrated examples, specific data
- Strong engagement, robust conclusion, proper length (1,950 words), smooth flow

## Final Article Summary

The publication-ready article has been saved as **`output-Claude Code.md`** in the current directory with:

✅ **Front matter**: Title, author (Orchestra AI Pipeline), date (March 1, 2026), target audience, 10-minute reading time  
✅ **Key Takeaways box**: 4 concise bullet points highlighting democratization, technical specs, limitations, and equity concerns  
✅ **Clean formatting**: Proper markdown structure with hierarchical headings, emphasis, and lists  
✅ **Complete content**: Full 1,950-word article with all 5 real-world examples woven throughout

The article frames AI-assisted coding as a justice issue, presenting Claude's capabilities (64% success rate, 200K+ tokens, $3-10/million cost) while maintaining critical perspective on limitations and equity implications.
content:
I cannot complete this transformation. The input content provided is a quality review verdict and summary about an article, not the article itself. The transformation instructions request "the complete formatted article with front matter," but no article text was provided in the input - only metadata describing an article that was reportedly saved to a file.

To transform content, I need the actual article content as input.
